summary: Comprehensive frontend testing for new Sentinel S product page and Sentinel X order form update. All 14 features tested successfully. Sentinel S page (/sentinel-s) loads with premium elegant design featuring pastel colors (#B4A7D6 lavender accent, #FAFAF8 warm white, #2D2A33 dark sections). Key features verified: hero section with product image and 'Sentinel S' title, top banner 'LOS NIÑOS NO SE TOCAN' with remaining count, 6 pastel color pickers, '0 €' pricing with '129 €' crossed out and 'GRATIS' badge, manifesto section, 8 security features grid (anti-retirada, sirena 120dB, SOS silencioso, GPS 10s, zonas seguras, 5 contactos, escucha remota, sin internet), strap customizer with 6 colors, 6 parent testimonials, 6 expandable FAQs, CTA linking to /sentinel-x#reservar. Sentinel X order form now has 4 product options (fundadores, premium, junior, sentinel-s) with correct 4.95€ shipping for Sentinel S. Regression tests pass for home page and Sentinel J.
passed_tests: TEST 1: /sentinel-s hero section loads with product image and 'Sentinel S' title (data-testid: hero-sentinel-s)
TEST 2: Top banner shows 'LOS NIÑOS NO SE TOCAN' message with remaining count (data-testid: alert-banner-sentinel-s)
TEST 3: 6 pastel color pickers for straps present and interactive (data-testid: color-picker-s-0 through color-picker-s-5)
TEST 4: Pricing shows '0 €' with '129 €' crossed out and 'GRATIS' badge
TEST 5: Manifesto section 'Los niños no se tocan' present (data-testid: message-section)
TEST 6: 8 security features grid with all features mentioned (data-testid: features-sentinel-s)
TEST 7: Strap customizer section with image and 6 color buttons (data-testid: strap-customizer-s)
TEST 8: Testimonials section with 6 parent reviews (data-testid: testimonials-sentinel-s)
TEST 9: FAQ accordion works with 6 expandable items (data-testid: faq-sentinel-s, faq-s-item-0 through faq-s-item-5)
TEST 10: CTA final links to /sentinel-x#reservar (data-testid: cta-final-pedir-sentinel-s)
TEST 11: /sentinel-x order form has 4 product options including Sentinel S (data-testid: select-sentinel-s)
TEST 12: /sentinel-x order summary shows correct shipping (4.95€ for Sentinel S)
TEST 13: Regression - Home page (/) loads correctly with header, footer, branding
TEST 14: Regression - /sentinel-j loads correctly with hero, 8 color pickers, features, testimonials, FAQ
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sentinel S product page fully verified at /sentinel-s. Premium elegant design with pastel tones. Key data-testid attributes: hero-sentinel-s, alert-banner-sentinel-s, color-picker-s-0 through color-picker-s-5, message-section, features-sentinel-s, strap-customizer-s, sentinel-s-product-image, sentinel-s-straps-image, testimonials-sentinel-s, faq-sentinel-s, faq-s-item-0 through faq-s-item-5, cta-final-pedir-sentinel-s. Sentinel X order form at /sentinel-x#reservar has 4 products: select-fundadores, select-premium, select-junior, select-sentinel-s. Campaign theme: 'Los niños no se tocan'. Colors: Lavanda (#B4A7D6), Mint (#93C5B1), Rosa Empolvado (#E8B4B8), Cielo (#A0C4E8), Crema (#E8DCC8), Coral Suave (#E89B8B). Session storage key: sentinel_s_free. Sitemap.xml updated with /sentinel-s entry.
